compiled_state.title: Complete fd0f-c05d docs: ticket-system-v3-architecture.md, ticket-flock-contract.md, CLAUDE.md sunset plan, and downstream epic scan
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Task

Remaining done definitions from story fd0f-c05d not covered by 43cd-465b:

### 1. plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md
Add section describing the bash-native dispatch architecture:
- ticket-lib-api.sh responsibilities (sourceable library, source-time guard, no subprocess overhead)
- _ticketlib_dispatch helper (subshell wrapper pattern)
- Dispatcher shift from exec (subprocess) to source (bash-native)
- _ticketlib_has_flock detection variable

### 2. plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-flock-contract.md
Update to describe bash-native flock(1) semantics:
- Lock-file path
- flock -x LOCK_EX
- flock -w 30 timeout
- 2-retry loop
- Cross-path canonicalization via pwd -P
- Annotate any python3 fcntl.flock references as historical

### 3. CLAUDE.md
Add sunset plan to the DSO_TICKET_LEGACY sentence (currently: 'debugging/rollback only'). Add: scheduled for removal after 2 stable plugin releases with no reported issues against the bash-native path.

### 4. Downstream epic scan
Scan epic specs 170b-2ac9, 736d-b957, 86c8-2d40 for stale flock-contract references (python3 fcntl.flock, fcntl, python3 subprocess for locking). File follow-up bug tickets for any stale references found.

## Testing Mode
GREEN — documentation update, no RED test required.
